infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Healthhomie reads Apple Health activity, weight, and sleep data to personalize calorie and macro goals.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Healthhomie can write nutrition totals to Apple Health when you choose to sync your food journal.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Healthhomie uses the camera to scan food barcodes.
